name: UserPreferencesManager

neutralConcepts: GET /api/users/:userId/preferences → { locale, userOverride } (or null/false on miss)
userOverride: true means tenant defaultLocale changes do NOT propagate
userOverride: false (or missing record) means tenant default applies
tenantId from ALS (CF-810) — stored on every write

ironRules.rule: Every setPreferences write stamps tenantId from ALS context. No parameter override.
storeDocument completes before method returns. No async side effects on user preference writes.

keywords: user preferences manager locale override tenant default reset data pipeline FLOW-48
